regimeNotes: NEUTRAL regime maintained 2026-06-22 (first trading day after Juneteenth holiday + weekend). Fed held rate range 3.50-3.75% but shifted to hawkish posture: 9 of 18 FOMC members now expect at least one rate hike by year-end 2026; market pricing shifted from cuts to potential hikes. DXY rose to ~100.76-101, highest since May 2025 — strong USD is a headwind for risk assets. 10Y yield 4.49% (+0.03% today), elevated and restrictive. S&P 500 at ~7,431 (+0.15% from June 18 close, near ATH). Crypto: BTC $64,649 (+0.88% 24h), ETH $1,765.54 (+2.51%), SOL $74.09 (+1.25%). F&G index 20 (Extreme Fear, unchanged). BTC dominance 56.21%. Total crypto mcap $2.30T (+0.86% 24h). IBIT pre-market +2.84% signals positive BTC ETF flows. EUR/USD 1.1462. Key event: Alphabet Gemini co-lead Noam Shazeer departed to join OpenAI — AI talent risk for GOOGL flagged but thesis not invalidated. Dalio quadrant: reflation-leaning (equities near ATH, but rate-hike probability rising). Action: trimmed SOL 3.48 shares to bring crypto sleeve from 20.26 pct to 20.00 pct under neutral-regime hard cap. 1 trade. NAV $99,938.19 (-$169.11 / -0.17 pct from June 21). Next catalysts: PCE data ~June 25, any Fed speaker guidance on rate path, GOOGL competitive positioning update.

SPY.thesis: Core US equity beta ($746.77 pre-market, 13.10% NAV). S&P near all-time highs (~7,431) with AI/semiconductor rally sustaining broad index; resilient despite hawkish Fed pivot. Diversified anchor under the growth-tilted mandate.
SPY.invalidationLevel: Sustained close below 660 USD or confirmed Fed re-pricing toward multiple hikes pushing SPY into a technical downtrend.

NVDA.thesis: AI/compute secular leader at $210.13 pre-market (above $208.44 avgCost, ~14.63% NAV). NVDA raised $25B in bonds on June 15 signaling management confidence in sustained AI capex demand. Highest-conviction growth driver for the 33% CAGR target.
NVDA.invalidationLevel: AI capex digestion or data-center demand rollover; close below ~150 USD.

MSFT.thesis: Quality AI/cloud compounder at $377.99 pre-market (below $391.98 avgCost, ~14.40% NAV). Azure cloud + Copilot AI revenue growing; thesis intact. Holding below avg cost; watching for recovery toward 390+.
MSFT.invalidationLevel: Cloud growth deceleration or AI capex without demonstrable ROI; close below 340 USD.

GOOGL.thesis: Quality growth (search + cloud + AI) at $361.30 pre-market (below $366.53 avgCost, ~14.20% NAV). Noam Shazeer (Gemini co-lead) departed to OpenAI — negative AI talent signal but search monopoly and cloud revenue stream remain dominant. $84.75B capital raise in June 2026 funds $180-190B capex plan. HOLD; thesis not invalidated at current price.
GOOGL.invalidationLevel: Search share erosion to AI rivals causing revenue decline; close below 310 USD.

UNH.thesis: Defensive value at $400.50 pre-market (below $408.52 avgCost, ~5.89% NAV). Medical-cost and regulatory headwinds persist; retained as defensive ballast and portfolio diversifier. Analyst targets 450-466 USD give upside if headwinds abate.
UNH.invalidationLevel: Further regulatory or medical-cost shock; close below 360 USD.

GLD.thesis: Tail/debasement hedge at $387.12 (above $386.54 avgCost, ~4.28% NAV). Central-bank buying supportive; small size prevents drag on 33% CAGR target. DXY rising toward 101 is a headwind; monitoring whether this forces a further trim.
GLD.invalidationLevel: Real yields spike with a strong USD reversal; close below 350 USD.

BTC.thesis: Core crypto sleeve leader at $64,649 (above $64,629 avgCost, ~14.51% NAV). F&G 20 (Extreme Fear) is contrarian bullish; BTC dominance 56.21% stable; IBIT pre-market +2.84% signals institutional demand. Well-positioned for next risk-on expansion when sleeve cap rises to 35%.

ETH.thesis: Discounted L1 leader at $1,765.54 (+2.51% 24h, above $1,667.47 avgCost, ~4.24% NAV). Dominance 9.25% rising (was 9.13%). Asymmetric upside when risk-on returns and capital rotates into alts.
ETH.invalidationLevel: Structural loss of share to L1 rivals; close below 1,300 USD.

SOL.thesis: High-beta satellite at $74.09 (above $67.81 avgCost, ~1.25% NAV). Trimmed from 20.322 to 16.842 shares to restore crypto sleeve to neutral 20% cap after crypto appreciated while stocks softened. First position to scale up when sleeve cap rises to 35% on risk-on regime flip.
SOL.invalidationLevel: Break below 52 USD; network deterioration or sentiment collapse.
